findings.description: stopAlertEvaluator() is never called in the SIGTERM/SIGINT shutdown handler in server.ts. The interval will keep firing during graceful shutdown, potentially causing errors after DB connections close.
Log message says 'Health sync background job started' but doesn't mention the alert evaluator that was just started on the previous line.
parseK8sResource doesn't handle all K8s resource suffixes (Ti, Pi, M, G, k). May cause NaN for uncommon node configurations.
compareValue 'eq' operator uses strict equality on numbers that may be rounded percentages — fragile for cpu/memory metrics.
